pageDesc: 43 documented cases of fraud and corruption in Mexican federal procurement. Ranked by estimated financial impact.

editorial.lede: 43 cases of fraud in Mexican federal public procurement, documented by journalists, auditors, and prosecutors. Ranked by estimated financial impact. Three patterns dominate: ghost companies (40%), overpricing (28%), and bid collusion (21%). Verified cases feed the v0.6.5 risk model — every documented company makes the model more precise.

disclaimer: Risk scores and fraud estimates are statistical indicators derived from procurement records. High scores indicate patterns similar to documented corruption cases — not proof of wrongdoing. All figures in MXN. Sources: ASF, SFP, MCCI, FGR, Animal Político.
